name: NYIT Campus Events
subtitle: Official NYIT Events app source
description: Install and update the NYIT Campus Events app for students and faculty.

apps.name: NYIT Events
apps.subtitle: Campus events for students & faculty
apps.localizedDescription: Browse, RSVP, and check in to NYIT campus events. Faculty can create and manage events. Scan QR codes at the door for instant check-in.
apps.versionDescription:
• Event calendar (week / month)
• Admin: delete event everywhere
• Admin: remove user data from app
• iOS sideload signing fixes

permissions.usageDescription: Used to scan QR codes for event check-in.
Used to show your location on the campus map and provide walking directions.
Used to send event reminders and announcements.
